mapper.insert: INSERT INTO api_metric_daily ( metric_date, category, endpoint, request_count, success_count, failure_count, redis_hits, redis_misses, db_hits, external_calls, external_failures, total_latency_ms, external_latency_ms ) VALUES ( #{metricDate}, #{category}, #{endpoint}, #{requestCount}, #{successCount}, #{failureCount}, #{redisHits}, #{redisMisses}, #{dbHits}, #{externalCalls}, #{externalFailures}, #{totalLatencyMs}, #{externalLatencyMs} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE request_count = request_count + VALUES(request_count), success_count = success_count + VALUES(success_count), failure_count = failure_count + VALUES(failure_count), redis_hits = redis_hits + VALUES(redis_hits), redis_misses = redis_misses + VALUES(redis_misses), db_hits = db_hits + VALUES(db_hits), external_calls = external_calls + VALUES(external_calls), external_failures = external_failures + VALUES(external_failures), total_latency_ms = total_latency_ms + VALUES(total_latency_ms), external_latency_ms = external_latency_ms + VALUES(external_latency_ms)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM api_metric_daily WHERE metric_date >= #{startDate} ORDER BY metric_date DESC, category ASC, endpoint ASC
